name: Complete Bus Sltons Accnting
registry_source: BBB Pittsburgh profile (Complete Business Services CPA, 6553/7329 Saltsburg Rd, Pittsburgh PA 15235)
notes: Source-list entry appears to be a misclassification: 7329 Saltsburg Rd, Pittsburgh PA matches 'Complete Business Services' — a CPA/accounting firm owned by Mike Dell (est. 2001), NOT a school-bus operator. FMCSA SAFER keyword search for 'COMPLETE BUS SOLUTIONS' returns no records, and no PA school-bus contractor at 7329 Saltsburg Rd is found (nearest is Krise Transportation at 7035 Saltsburg Rd). Recommend removing from prospect list. The 'Sltons Accnting' fragment in the source name corroborates this is 'Solutions Accounting' (i.e., Complete Business Solutions / Accounting).

name: Krapf School Bus
fmcsa_address: 110 E WALNUT STREET, RED LION, PA 17356-2516
officers: Krapf family ownership (parent: Krapf Group, founded 1942 by George Krapf Jr.)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER snapshot for KRAPF SCHOOL BUS-RLB INC (legal name); company operates in York County PA under Red Lion Bus name as part of the Krapf Group. PA Dept of State entity registration not directly retrieved in this run; parent Krapf Bus Companies/Krapf's Coaches Inc. incorporated 11/24/1982 per BBB.
notes: Address (110 E Walnut St, Red Lion, PA 17356) is an EXACT match between source list and SAFER record. Legal name in SAFER is 'KRAPF SCHOOL BUS-RLB INC' (RLB = Red Lion Bus). 28 US inspections in last 24 months with 0% out-of-service; one injury crash, no fatal/tow crashes. Last MCS-150 update 05/15/2026. Review date 02/02/2021. Strong tuck-in candidate but note this is a subsidiary of Krapf Group (one of the largest privately-owned school-bus contractors in the US, ~2,500 buses across PA/DE/NJ/NY).

name: Attica Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Property/Passenger carrier (per loadconnect summary; SAFER snapshot direct fetch returned INACTIVE flag — see notes)
fmcsa_status: inactive per direct SAFER fetch (record flagged INACTIVE); however third-party mirrors and BBB show active operations
entity_status: active (35 years in business per BBB, A+ rating, file opened 11/24/2003)
registry_source: BBB Attica NY profile (file 0041-66005650); third-party SAFER mirrors (loadconnect, searchcarriers); NY DOS entity registration not directly retrieved (dos.ny.gov database did not return data in this run).
notes: Address 949 Creek Rd, Attica NY 14011 is exact match. Business start AND incorporation both 6/20/1990. President Ralph E. Marvin. Industry: School and Employee Bus Transportation + Charter. Fleet 25 power units / 18 drivers per third-party FMCSA mirrors. Note: Direct SAFER snapshot fetch for USDOT 3175593 returned 'INACTIVE in SAFER database' — this may reflect a USDOT registration lapse, or biennial MCS-150 update overdue, even though the company is operationally active per BBB (open M-F 7am-5pm) and atticacsd.org transportation contact references it. Verify USDOT status directly before contact.

name: Colonial Bus Svc
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity search not directly retrieved; no confident match in public sources.
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword searches for 'COLONIAL BUS' and 'COLONIAL COACHES' both return NO matching carriers. Address 359 Brickcrafters Rd, New Oxford PA 17350 appears on Zillow as a residential/property listing — no business signage online. No Conewago Valley SD or Adams County bus-contractor listing surfaces a 'Colonial Bus Service.' Possible explanations: (1) very small private operator that exited USDOT registry or operates intrastate only below FMCSA registration threshold; (2) source-list typo/misclassification; (3) DBA of another small contractor. Recommend verification via PA Dept of State business entity search or direct outreach before continuing diligence.

name: D & K Bus Charter Svc

notes: The only FMCSA hit for 'D & K BUS CHARTER LLC' is USDOT 1892995, but that record is physically located at 5700 Blackberry Lane, Jefferson City, MO 65101 (NOT Fort Lauderdale FL) — 6 power units, 18 drivers, Intrastate Only, Private Passenger (non-business), USDOT active, no operating authority. That MO entity is clearly NOT the source-list entry. SAFER keyword search 'D & K BUS' returns no records, and no Fort Lauderdale charter bus operator named 'D & K Bus Charter Service' surfaces in web searches at 110 SE 6th St, Fort Lauderdale FL 33301 (which is in the downtown business district — likely an attorney/registered-agent or virtual-office address, not an operating bus yard). Possible the FL entity is dissolved, a small intrastate-only operator below FMCSA registration threshold, or a source-list error. Sunbiz direct fetch returned HTTP 403. Recommend manual Sunbiz lookup and physical address verification.
